FR-01.title: Document Upload and Storage
requirements: Implement complete document upload and storage functionality
All document upload and storage operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for document upload and storage actions
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all document upload and storage operations
System validates all document upload and storage inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for document upload and storage failures
document upload and storage data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build Document Upload and Storage API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for document upload and storage feature in Document Management System. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Document Upload and Storage UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for document upload and storage. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Design Document Upload and Storage Database Schema
FR-01.description: Create database tables/collections for document upload and storage. Define fields, data types, constraints, indexes, and relationships. Add migration scripts.

FR-02.description: Write unit and integration tests for folder and directory structure feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
